title: luzula campestris f. althii
intro: Luzula campestris f. althii, also known as Field Wood Rush or Luzula, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Luzula campestris f. althii include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Luzula campestris f. althii is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
